title: G11 BYO-LLM Ingest Keystone — schema step-14, engine, bindings, conformance

commits.subject: design(slice-15): G11 edge enrichment + BYO-LLM ingest design memo
test(slice-15): RED — step-14 migration + BYO-LLM ingest conformance tests
feat(slice-15): G11 BYO-LLM ingest — schema step-14, engine, bindings, conformance (GREEN)

findings_addressed: Schema step_id 14 / SCHEMA_VERSION 13→14: 5 additive nullable columns on canonical_edges (body TEXT, t_valid TEXT, t_invalid TEXT, confidence REAL, extractor_model_id TEXT) via MIGRATION-ACCRETION-EXEMPTION; search_index_edges FTS5 table for edge body full-text search (Option B — additive, no changes to existing search_index); accretion-exemption marker (required, pinned).

Engine: Engine::ingest_with_extractor(cmd, documents) — spawns BYO-LLM harness, speaks fathomdb.extract.v1 NDJSON-over-stdio protocol (hello→ready→extract→result/error), maps entities→PreparedWrite::Node (derive_logical_id sha256), maps fact-edges→PreparedWrite::Edge with G11 body/t_valid/t_invalid/confidence/extractor_model_id fields, calls self.write(), drops stdin, waits for child exit.
derive_logical_id(kind, name) = sha256('<kind>:<name>'.to_lowercase()) hex-encoded — stable cross-ingest entity identity, deterministic deduplication.
Edge logical_id = sha256('edge:<from_lid>:<to_lid>:<relation>') — keyed on directed relation, not on body content.
Invalidate-not-accumulate: G11 fact-edges (body IS NOT NULL) use tombstone-then-insert supersession keyed on (from_id, to_id, kind) — a repeated identical fact overwrites rather than accumulates.
Projection notification fix: edge-only write batches now trigger notify_new_work() when any PreparedWrite::Edge has body IS NOT NULL (previously edge-body writes were never scheduled for projection).
SoftFallbackBranch::TextEdge distinguishes edge FTS5 results from node FTS5 results in all match arms (engine, Python binding, NAPI binding, TypeScript SDK).
EngineError::Extractor leaf variant for harness protocol errors; FDB_EXTRACTOR error code in NAPI; ExtractorError(EngineError) in Python; ExtractorError extends FathomDbError in TypeScript.
ExtractDocument {source_doc_id, body} and IngestWithExtractorReceipt {nodes_written, edges_written, docs_processed} exposed in all three bindings.
Governed surface allowlist updated: ingest_with_extractor (Python snake_case) + ingestWithExtractor (TypeScript camelCase) added to governed-surface-allowlist.json.
Type stubs (_fathomdb.pyi) updated for Python; NativeEngine interface updated for TypeScript.
DOC-INDEX entry added for dev/design/slice-15-design.md (G11 BYO-LLM design memo).
Constructor churn: 8 existing PreparedWrite::Edge construction sites updated with 5 new None G11 fields (engine tests, examples, corpus support).

blockers_encountered.description: Edge-only write batches never triggered notify_new_work() because collect_projection_jobs only processes Node variants. An edge body write would be committed to canonical_edges.body but the projection scheduler would never wake to build the search_index_edges FTS5 entry. Discovered by the edge_vector_searchable and edge_fts_searchable tests failing RED.
blockers_encountered.resolution: Fixed in write_inner: added has_edge_body_work check (any PreparedWrite::Edge with body: Some(_)) and ORed it into the pending_projection guard. Tests GREEN.

blockers_encountered.description: PreparedWrite had #[derive(Eq)] but Option<f64> does not implement Eq (f64 is not Eq due to NaN). Adding confidence: Option<f64> to the Edge variant broke the derive.
blockers_encountered.resolution: Removed Eq from the derive; kept PartialEq. Not a semantic regression — Eq was unused in any assert_eq! on PreparedWrite values.

blockers_encountered.description: SoftFallbackBranch::TextEdge was added to the Rust enum but not covered in the Python (fathomdb-py) and NAPI (fathomdb-napi) match arms converting branch to string.
blockers_encountered.resolution: Added TextEdge => 'text_edge'.to_string() to all match arms in both bindings (3 arms total in NAPI, 2 in Python).

blockers_encountered.description: recency_does_not_override_a_clear_rrf_signal fails on the baseline main branch too. Not caused by our changes.

additional_changes_made_in_scope: stub_harness.py fixture: executable Python harness implementing fathomdb.extract.v1 with 5 entities + 3 edges, used by all conformance tests; golden fixture_result.json anchors reproducibility.

Constructor churn: 8 existing PreparedWrite::Edge construction sites updated with body:None, t_valid:None, t_invalid:None, confidence:None, extractor_model_id:None (mechanical, required by new non-defaulted enum fields).
SoftFallbackBranch::TextEdge also threaded into TypeScript binding (search result mapping in index.ts) for round-trip consistency.
package-lock.json regenerated (ts/package-lock.json updated as a side-effect of ts/ dependency resolution).
deviations_for_orchestrator_awareness: Edge FTS5 projection path: search_index_edges is populated by the projection scheduler, NOT in the same transaction as canonical_edges. A window exists between the write commit and projection completion where edge bodies are in canonical_edges but not yet searchable. This is identical to the existing node FTS5 behavior (search_index is also projection-scheduled). Marked in the design memo.

ingest_with_extractor does not validate cmd[0] against any allowlist; the caller is trusted. Security model is caller-controlled subprocess (same trust level as calling Engine::open with a user-supplied path).
derive_logical_id uses sha256 hex (64-char) for entity logical_ids — this is a string, not a UUID4. Consistent with the G0 substrate design (logical_id TEXT, no format constraint in schema).
latent_errors_assessment: No unresolved code-level errors introduced by this slice. The pre-existing recency test failure is unchanged. All 10 BYO-LLM ingest tests pass GREEN. Clippy and fmt clean. DoD met.
next_step_for_orchestrator: Codex §9 adversarial review of: (1) step-14 migration SQL + accretion guard marker; (2) ingest_with_extractor protocol implementation (hello→ready→extract→result/error parsing, entity/edge mapping, derive_logical_id formula); (3) invalidate-not-accumulate supersession logic; (4) projection notification fix; (5) binding parity (Python ExtractorError hierarchy, TypeScript ExtractorError + SoftFallbackBranch). On PASS: advance the 0.8.1 board pointer from Slice 15 to the next slice (Slice 20 graph-traversal or Slice 5 R0 recall-CDF per the plan). Remove worktree /tmp/fdb-slice-15-20260613T042247Z.
